name: Value AI Analysis Runner
description: Daily (9:30 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Feeds top 10 value candidates to Value Strategy Analyst for DCF, value trap detection, margin-of-safety assessment.

parameters.content:
## Value AI Runner

Required: postgresApi, anthropicApi, neo4j
Uses: Value Strategy Analyst agent
Includes Neo4j peer comparison data

parameters.query: SELECT w.ticker,t.company_name,t.sector,t.industry,t.market_cap,f.pe_ratio,f.pb_ratio,f.ps_ratio,f.debt_to_equity,f.current_ratio,f.roe,f.roa,f.free_cash_flow,f.dividend_yield,f.net_margin,f.revenue,f.net_income FROM watchlists w JOIN tickers t ON w.ticker=t.ticker LEFT JOIN fundamentals f ON t.ticker=f.ticker AND f.period_date=(SELECT MAX(period_date) FROM fundamentals WHERE ticker=t.ticker) WHERE w.strategy='value' AND w.status='active' ORDER BY w.score DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (c:Company {ticker:$ticker})-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]->(i:Industry)<-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]-(peer:Company) WHERE peer.ticker <> $ticker WITH peer.ticker AS peer_ticker, peer.name AS peer_name, i.name AS industry OPTIONAL MATCH (peer)-[w:IN_WATCHLIST]->(wl:Watchlist) RETURN peer_ticker, peer_name, industry, collect(DISTINCT wl.name) AS on_watchlists ORDER BY peer_name LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO investment_scores (ticker,strategy,score_date,overall_score,recommendation,thesis,created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}','value',CURRENT_DATE,7.0,'HOLD','{{$json.output}}',NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker,strategy,score_date) DO UPDATE SET thesis=EXCLUDED.thesis;
